description: This is not an Indian government welfare scheme.

scheme_name: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP)
description: The Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps keep families safe and healthy through initiatives that assist families with energy costs.
benefit: Assistance with home energy bills, energy crises, weatherization, and minor energy-related home repairs.
application_process: For information on how to apply for energy assistance, please visit Energyhelp.us.

description: A joint federal-state program that provides health insurance coverage to low-income individuals and families.
application_process: Eligibility is determined through an application process, which can be completed online, by phone, or in person. Required documents may include proof of income, residency, and citizenship.

description: MyScheme is a National Platform that aims to offer one-stop search and discovery of the Government schemes.
application_process: Enter details, select schemes, and apply through the dedicated scheme page with detailed knowledge, FAQs, and application process.

description: The Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) is a government initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban poor. The scheme aims to provide a pucca house to eligible beneficiaries, with a focus on Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) and Low-Income Groups (LIG).
benefit: ₹1.5 lakh for BLC, ₹1 lakh for ISSR
application_process: Beneficiaries can apply through the PMAY-U website or through State/UT governments. The application process involves submitting required documents and meeting eligibility criteria.

description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban 2.0 (PMAY-U 2.0) aims to provide Central Assistance to eligible families/beneficiaries through States/UTs/PLIs to construct, purchase or rent affordable houses in urban areas.
benefit: Financial Assistance to construct, purchase or rent a house at an affordable cost in cities.
application_process: Eligible families/beneficiaries can apply for PMAY-U 2.0 through States/UTs/PLIs. The application process involves submitting required documents and meeting the eligibility criteria.

description: The PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi scheme provides an income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families. The scheme aims to supplement the financial needs of the farmers and help them improve their livelihoods.
benefit: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments
application_process: The state government and UT administration will identify the eligible farmer families as per the scheme guidelines. The fund will be directly transferred to the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.

description: The poverty guidelines are used to determine financial eligibility for certain programs.
application_process: The poverty guidelines are used to determine eligibility for certain programs. No application process is required.

description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) provides health coverage to economically vulnerable families.
benefit: Cashless treatment up to Rs. 5 lakh per year
application_process: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card.

description: The Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) program is designed to help families with children experiencing low-income achieve economic security and stability.
application_process: States receive block grants to design and operate programs that accomplish one of the purposes of the TANF program.
